name: a429SetParity
title: a429SetParity
syntax: dword a429SetParity( a429word myA429word, int parity_value );
description: This function sets the selector parity of an ARINC word. So you may change the mode of parity generation for every single ARINC word.
Note: This modifies the ARINC word attributes only. For transmission call the function output.
